caribbean.headline: Bimini Faces Strong Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing winds of up to 38 kt and wave heights of 3.5 ft, with a 55% chance of rain, while nearby Roatan is seeing much calmer conditions with winds of 24 kt. I expect these strong winds in Bimini to lead to a Small Craft Advisory, making for challenging marine conditions in the area.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Haifa
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing strong winds of up to 20 kt and significant wave heights of 11.2 ft, with a dominant swell direction from the NNW and a high rain probability of 98%. Mykonos is also being impacted with winds reaching 26 kt, making for challenging marine conditions in the Eastern Mediterranean.
